about.title: About LegalPedia
about.story: LegalPedia was founded on a simple but powerful belief: that every client deserves honest, dedicated, and results-driven legal representation. What began as a small practice driven by integrity has grown steadily into a trusted name in the legal community.
about.story_2: Over the years, we have earned the confidence of individuals and businesses alike — not through grand promises, but through consistent results, transparent communication, and a genuine commitment to our clients' well-being.
about.mission: To deliver the highest quality legal services while maintaining the trust, integrity, and personal attention that our clients deserve.
about.vision: To be the leading legal platform recognized for legal innovation, client satisfaction, and community impact.

values.title: Integrity
values.desc: We uphold honesty and transparency in all legal matters.

values.title: Confidentiality
values.desc: Your information is handled with strict privacy and care.

values.title: Professional Excellence
values.desc: We deliver high-quality legal services with precision.

values.title: Client Commitment
values.desc: We prioritize our clients' needs and outcomes.

audience.title: Property Clients
audience.desc: Real estate and property law services.

timeline.title: Foundation
timeline.desc: LegalPedia was established with a vision to provide accessible, high-quality legal services.

timeline.title: Building Trust
timeline.desc: Expanded our client base through consistent results and word-of-mouth referrals.

timeline.title: Service Expansion
timeline.desc: Added intellectual property and employment law to our practice areas.

timeline.title: Digital Transformation
timeline.desc: Launched digital client services and AI-powered legal assistance.

timeline.title: Regional Recognition
timeline.desc: Recognized as one of the region's most trusted legal institutions.

timeline.title: Present Day
timeline.desc: Continuing to grow with a dedicated team serving clients across multiple practice areas.

services.title: Legal Services
services.subtitle: Strategic legal advice from a team you can trust

faqs.q: How long does this process take?
faqs.a: Timelines vary by case complexity, but most matters progress within 2–8 weeks after initial consultation.
Bring any contracts, identification, and correspondence relevant to your matter. We'll request specifics during onboarding.
Submit an inquiry through our contact form or chatbot, and a lawyer will follow up within one business day.

faqs.q: Do I need a consultation first?
faqs.a: Yes, an initial consultation lets us understand your needs and recommend the right approach.

corporate.title: Corporate Law
corporate.short: Expert guidance for business formation, governance, mergers, and acquisitions.
corporate.full: Our corporate law team provides comprehensive legal support for businesses at every stage. From entity formation and corporate governance to complex mergers and acquisitions, we help organizations navigate the legal landscape with confidence.

litigation.title: Minerals, licenses, Tenders
litigation.short: Aggressive representation in commercial disputes and civil proceedings.
litigation.full: When disputes arise, our litigation team is prepared to protect your interests vigorously. We handle complex commercial litigation, contract disputes, and civil proceedings with a strategic approach designed to achieve favorable outcomes.

ip.title: Construction
ip.short: Protecting your innovations, trademarks, copyrights, and trade secrets.
ip.full: Innovation deserves protection. Our IP attorneys help clients secure and defend their intellectual property rights, including patents, trademarks, copyrights, and trade secrets across all industries.
benefits: Comprehensive legal consultation on FIDIC and EPC contracts
Comprehensive legal consultation on FIDIC and EPC contracts
Comprehensive legal consultation on FIDIC and EPC contracts

realestate.title: Corporate law
realestate.short: Comprehensive legal services for property transactions and development.
realestate.full: Our real estate practice covers residential and commercial transactions, land use and zoning, construction law, and property disputes. We guide clients through every aspect of real estate dealings.

family.title: Litigation, arbitration, and dispute
family.short: Compassionate counsel for divorce, custody, and family matters.
family.full: Family legal matters require sensitivity and expertise. Our family law attorneys provide compassionate representation in divorce, child custody, adoption, and prenuptial agreements.

employment.title: Other
employment.short: Protecting employer and employee rights in the workplace.
employment.full: We advise both employers and employees on workplace legal issues including discrimination, wrongful termination, employment contracts, and regulatory compliance.
benefits: Intellectual Property, Labor Disputes, Family Disputes...
Intellectual Property, Labor Disputes, Family Disputes...
Intellectual Property, Labor Disputes, Family Disputes...

services.sub_intro: Our {{area}} team offers dedicated, hands-on support for {{topic}}. From your first consultation to final resolution, we translate complex legal requirements into clear, practical steps so you always know where you stand and what happens next.
services.sub_overview: {{topic}} is a core part of our {{area}} practice. We assess your circumstances, identify risks and opportunities, and prepare the documents, filings, and strategy needed to protect your interests. Whether you are an individual or a business, our advice is tailored to your specific goals and budget.
services.sub_inc_1: Initial review and assessment of your {{topic}} matter
services.sub_inc_2: Clear, written advice on your rights and options
services.sub_inc_3: Preparation and review of all required documents
services.sub_inc_4: Representation and negotiation on your behalf
services.sub_inc_5: Ongoing updates and direct access to your lawyer
services.sub_inc_6: Transparent fees agreed before we begin
services.sub_step_1_d: We listen to your situation, explain how the law applies to {{topic}}, and outline the possible routes forward.
services.sub_step_2_d: We agree a clear plan and transparent fee so there are no surprises.
services.sub_step_3_d: We prepare documents, handle filings, and represent you in negotiations or proceedings.
services.sub_step_4_d: We see your matter through to completion and advise on any next steps.
services.sub_why: Getting {{topic}} right protects you from costly mistakes, delays, and disputes down the line. Our experienced {{area}} team gives you the confidence that every detail is handled correctly and your interests are fully protected.

userFlow.title: Your Legal Journey
userFlow.subtitle: A clear, step-by-step process to resolve your legal matters with confidence.
userFlow.cta_subtitle: Our experienced team is ready to guide you through every step.

steps.title: Visit Our Platform
steps.detail: Browse our website to learn about our practice areas, team, and how we can help with your legal needs.

steps.title: Select Your Issue
steps.detail: Choose from corporate law, litigation, IP, real estate, family law, or employment law based on your situation.

steps.title: Review Details
steps.detail: Read detailed information about each service, including benefits, process, and what to expect.

steps.title: Engage With Us
steps.detail: Use our AI legal assistant for quick answers, or reach out directly to schedule a consultation.

steps.title: Submit Inquiry
steps.detail: Fill out our contact form or upload relevant documents so our team can review your situation.

steps.title: Lawyer Reviews
steps.detail: A qualified lawyer reviews your case, researches applicable law, and prepares a tailored strategy.

steps.title: Receive Solution
steps.detail: Receive a comprehensive legal solution, ongoing support, and guidance for next steps.

testimonials.name: James Morrison
testimonials.text: Outstanding legal representation. Their team handled our corporate restructuring with exceptional professionalism and attention to detail.

testimonials.name: Sarah Chen
testimonials.text: I've worked with many law firms, but none compare to the dedication and expertise shown by this team. They made a complex property deal seamless.

testimonials.name: Robert Williams
testimonials.text: They took the time to understand my business needs and provided practical, cost-effective legal solutions. Highly recommended.

whyChoose.title: Why Choose LegalPedia

points.title: Strict Confidentiality

points.title: Professional Legal Support

points.title: Client-Focused Approach
points.desc: We prioritize understanding your goals and crafting strategies that align with your best interests.
